other_observers: Ric Olson; Seen and heard by several others before this date.
specific_location: Lesser Prairie-Chicken lek, off Road G, east of Campo
description: Meadowlark, singing and calling. Whiter face than Western Meadowlark.Behaviors: Singing and calling on top of yuccas.Call: singing and calling. Clear whistle song and "bzert" call note, typical of the species.Plumage: adult
